name: Fenrir (NSFW)
description:
Fenrir from GBF. A once-mighty god-eater shackled for all eternity.

It may not have turned out quite right, since I haven't played GBF, but I tried to make it as canonical as possible.

Plot: It's an alternative Middle Ages. You were walking through the forest when you suddenly heard strange sounds from a nearby clearing. Coming closer, you discovered a wolf girl who was tied up in shackles.

P.s.: ⚠️ Content warning - this is NSFW version. Depending on your roleplay, this may go towards something very hot. However, it all depends on whether you will show romantic interest or not. Also, given the character's aggressive nature, something more questionable could happen.

P.s. 2: Given the nature of this character, his behavior without restrictions is very peculiar. There may be a lot of swearing and other questionable things. In the worst case, you can probably get eaten, killed or something else. Although I did add some character adjustments so that something weird didn't happen from the start, everything will depend only on your RP. However, you probably know what you are doing.

Boring numbers:

Total: 2320 tokens. Permanent: 876 tokens

(Not good, not terrible)
